user.title: GO Transit — API Key
user.description: Enter your OpenMetrolinx API key. Register free at {register_url}

route.title: GO Transit — Route & Schedule
route.description: Stations load live from the GO API. Add this integration again to monitor another route.

data.line_code: Line (optional — filters to this line only)
data.commute_start: Commute window start (HH:MM) — faster train tracking
data.service_start: Service hours start (HH:MM) — no polling before this
data.service_end: Service hours end (HH:MM) — overnight window supported

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key — check your OpenMetrolinx key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the GO Transit API. Check your network.
error.no_stops: API returned no stops. The key may lack the required permissions.
error.same_stop: Boarding and destination stations must be different.
